summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GoSolo Orders & Admin Management features. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Status transition validation working correctly on both frontend and backend
Good error handling with proper error messages
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data orders: a74e0fbb (PENDING->DELIVERED), a0e2b72f (SHIPPED->DELIVERED), 0445375c (PAID->SHIPPED)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Orders & Admin Management fully tested. Status transitions validated: PENDING->PAID/CANCELLED, PAID->SHIPPED/CANCELLED, SHIPPED->DELIVERED. All 3 test orders have been updated during testing (2 DELIVERED, 1 SHIPPED). Frontend pages: /orders, /orders/[id], /admin/orders all working. Navigation via navbar My Orders link working.

backend_apis: GET /api/orders/list - Returns orders with payment status and item count
GET /api/admin/orders - Returns all orders with items and payment details
GET /api/admin/orders/[id] - Returns single order with full details
PATCH /api/admin/orders/[id] - Updates order status with transition validation
frontend_pages: /orders - User orders list with status badges, amounts, item counts
/orders/[id] - Order detail with progress tracker, items, payment info
/admin/orders - Admin order management with status filtering and updates
ui_interactions: Order card click to view details
Admin status update dropdown with valid transitions only
